evals.prompt: Build a responsive reader layout with mobile drawer and desktop side panels
evals.expected_output: Viewport-specific layout with proper breakpoints and spacing

evals.prompt: Add localization support to the reader admin panel with locale switcher
evals.expected_output: Locale catalog integration with fallback strings and switcher component

evals.prompt: Add ARIA labels and keyboard navigation to the annotation panel
evals.expected_output: Accessible annotation panel with focus traps and semantic roles
